name: grid402-coverage
iso_terminology_note: ISO here means Independent System Operator (the entity balancing supply and demand on a regional grid), not the International Organization for Standardization.

operators.name: California ISO
operators.notes: CAISO publishes a live carbon-intensity overlay (CISO_CO2 series) which we cross-reference against IPCC-factor calculations.

operators.name: Electric Reliability Council of Texas
operators.notes: Wind dominates; mix swings 60+ percentage points day-to-day.

operators.name: National Energy System Operator
operators.notes: Truly key-free upstream. Returns both percentage mix and a published carbon intensity value (we use NESO's number directly when available). Wind-heavy, often under 150 gCO2/kWh. Spot via BMRS/Elexon coming in v2.

operators.name: Korea Power Exchange
operators.notes: KRW->USD conversion uses live ECB reference rate; raw KRW price preserved in price_krw_per_mwh. v2 API is hourly; v1 XML fallback offers 5-min.

operators.name: Australian Energy Market Operator
operators.notes: Each NEM region dispatched independently with distinct CI profile (TAS1 hydro-clean, QLD1 coal-heavy). WEM (Western Australia) not yet covered.

coming_soon.scope: switch from estimate to real upstream
